use_cases: Main navigation header for landing pages or marketing sites
Tab-based navigation for dashboard or app-wide navigation
Responsive navigation menu for websites with multiple sections
ai_summary: A horizontal tab navigation component featuring a smooth animated cursor that follows hover states. Uses Framer Motion for fluid transitions and mix-blend-difference for text color inversion effects. The tabs are contained in a rounded pill-shaped container with bold black borders, creating a clean minimalist aesthetic suitable for modern SaaS and landing page headers.
